description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a smooth, light gray upholstery that covers its entire surface. The sofa features broad, rounded armrests that are generously padded and extend slightly outward, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The seat consists of a single, wide cushion with subtle horizontal stitching, while the backrest is divided into two large, attached cushions with gentle contouring for ergonomic support. The base of the sofa is solid and fully upholstered, with only small, barely visible feet at the corners. The overall silhouette is soft and curvaceous, with no sharp edges, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments. The sofa's design emphasizes comfort and simplicity, with a uniform color and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater sofa with broad, padded armrests and a smooth, continuous upholstery. It features a single seat cushion and two attached back cushions, all with subtle stitching and a soft, rounded silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two attached back cushions, single seat cushion, and wide, rounded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest and the gentle curve of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, fully upholstered back with no visible seams or legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same padded armrest and smooth seat profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One wide, attached seat cushion and two large, attached back cushions; all cushions are uniform in size and integrated into the sofa structure.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, rounded, and heavily padded armrests that are slightly flared outward and rise to just below the top of the backrest.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are minimal and mostly hidden, likely small block-style supports at the corners, barely visible from the front and sides.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with two large, attached cushions; gently curved and softly contoured for comfort.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray upholstery with a smooth texture and subtle horizontal stitching on the seat and back cushions; no visible decorative patterns.
